title: HTHD-179 Friend's Mother ~ Final Chapter ~ Yuki Kojima
description: "What's wrong with Yuichi-kun! Stop it!" Yuki desperately resisted being pushed down by his son's friend Yuichi. However, on the other hand, Yuichi's words, "You're lonely, I'll comfort you," echoed in my head. Busy husbands often stay overnight and have no choice but to comfort themselves with masturbation. Yuichi was excited to see Yuki. If my husband or son finds out, it will be a big deal. While thinking so, Yuki's body weakened its resistance.
